description: Go program calling language.Parse() through an interface dispatch pattern. The vulnerable function is invoked indirectly via a Parser interface, testing that reachability analysis handles interface-based dispatch.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: language.Parse() is called inside LangParser.Parse() method, which is invoked through the Parser interface in run(). Interface dispatch does not prevent reachability.

findings.human_justification: language.Parse() is called inside LangParser.Parse(), reachable through interface dispatch from main(). The vulnerable symbol is present in compiled source.
